recommendations: During implement, generate bubble-styles.css from all 71 keys in ir/slices/styles.json — do not rely on DS-01 ir_refs sample alone.
Land DS-01 before DS-02 through DS-06; complete ENUM-03 before DS-04 per depends_on chain.
Export all design-system and chat primitives through frontend/src/components/design-system/index.ts and frontend/src/components/chat/index.ts for downstream modules.

critiques.finding: DS-01-design-tokens-and-bubble-styles ir_refs lists 21 representative style keys while scope and AC-2 commit to all 71 entries in ir/slices/styles.json; ~50 styles (Group_hero_, Button_icon_, Popup_dialog_, Group_sidebar_, pricing/badge variants, etc.) are absent from ir_refs, weakening traceability even though ACs cover the full catalog.
critiques.alternative: Add ir_refs for every styles.json key or reference the slice path ir/slices/styles.json explicitly on DS-01; optionally split token extraction (DS-01a) from full style-class migration (DS-01b) if implement waves need smaller chunks.

critiques.alternative: Expand ui_refs on DS-05/DS-06 to include every element id cited in ACs and top-level regions from ir/inventory.json under bTIRW, or add a layout_notes cross-reference to element_definitions/bTIRa subtree anchors.
